creator: t@nakao.org
text:
Dear freebsd-ports-bugs,

More than three weeks has passed since I submitted this PR.
As far as I checked the status of it, I cannot see any progress
on it. It looks like my contribution to FreeBSD community is
silently ignored.

Please take any action on it ASAP and let me know if I have to
do something more.

Regards,
Takayuki Nakao
